issues.message: Server did not reach "Done!" — likely failed during startup.
pride may be a bad download — confirm by removing it and testing startup.

mod_log_errors.sample_line: [16Jun2026 12:00:06.012] [main/ERROR] [net.neoforged.fml.ModLoader/]: File provided by mod pride does not exist!

mod_recommendations.sample_line: [16Jun2026 12:00:06.012] [main/ERROR] [net.neoforged.fml.ModLoader/]: File provided by mod pride does not exist!
mod_recommendations.why: Mod jar for pride appears corrupt or incomplete on disk.
mod_recommendations.fix: pride may be a bad download — confirm by removing it and testing startup.
fix_steps: Remove Pride (pride.jar) from your server mods/ folder.
Start the server and wait for "Done!" — if it boots, that mod was blocking startup.
Re-download Pride from the official source (Modrinth/CurseForge) and put the jar back in mods/.
Start again — if it fails the same way, leave the mod out or try a different version; you have confirmed the culprit.
mod_recommendations.action_detail: Confirm pride is the problem by removing it, testing startup, then reinstalling if needed.
